-v: Display the version of the tool
-version: Display the version of the tool
--info: Display general information about the tool

winget_core_info.install:
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym}}Install the specified package (by searching configured sources or directly finding it from the manifest).
By default, the query must match the package's id, name, or moniker in a case-insensitive manner.
Other fields can be used by passing the respective options.
By default, the install command checks the package installation status and attempts to perform an upgrade if applicable.
Use --force to override and perform a direct install
winget_core_info.show:
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym}}Display information about a specific package.
By default, the query must match the package's ID, name, or moniker in a case-insensitive manner.
Other fields can be used by passing the respective options.
winget_core_info.__query:
Alias: --query
Usage: -q <query>...
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym_wr}}Query used for searching packages
winget_core_info.__query_a:
Alias: -q
Usage: --query <query>...
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym_wr}}Query used for searching packages
winget_core_info.__manifest:
Alias: --manifest
Usage: -m <manifest>
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym_wr}}Path to the package manifest (YAML) file
Use manifest to run the installation experience from a local YAML file
winget_core_info.__manifest_a:
Alias: -m
Usage: --manifest <manifest>
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym_wr}}Path to the package manifest (YAML) file
Use manifest to run the installation experience from a local YAML file
winget_core_info.__version:
Alias: --version
Usage: -v <version>
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym_wr}}Use the specified version, default is the latest version
winget_core_info.__version_a:
Alias: -v
Usage: --version <version>
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym_wr}}Use the specified version, default is the latest version
winget_core_info.__source:
Alias: --source

Alias: -s
Usage: --source <source>

winget_core_info.__exact:
Alias: --exact
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym_opt}}Use exact string in the query, including case sensitivity. It won't use substring default behavior
winget_core_info.__exact_a:
Alias: -e
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym_opt}}Use exact string in the query, including case sensitivity. It won't use substring default behavior
winget_core_info.__interactive:
Alias: --interactive
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym_opt}}Run installer in interactive mode. Default experience displays installer progress
winget_core_info.__interactive_a:
Alias: -i
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym_opt}}Run installer in interactive mode. Default experience displays installer progress
winget_core_info.__silent:
Alias: --silent

winget_core_info.__accept_source_agreements: {{$PSCompletions.config.sym_opt}}Used to accept source license agreements and avoid prompts
